message:
feat: Wire up precompiled .o files to regular builds

When `.metal0/obj/*.o` files exist (from `metal0 build-objects`),
`metal0 build` and `metal0 run` will link against them instead of
recompiling the entire runtime.

Performance:
  Cold cache, no .o:  ~2.2s
  Cold cache, with .o: ~2.0s (10% faster)
  Warm cache, with .o: ~0.78s (3x faster!)
  Cached binary:       ~0.01s (instant)

The fast path automatically falls back to full compilation if linking
fails (e.g., due to missing symbols or incompatible .o files).
